subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Linear search time complexity:
explanation: Check each element sequentially. Worst case: n comparisons.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Linear search works on:
explanation: No ordering requirement. Works on any iterable collection.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Best case of linear search:
explanation: If target is the first element, found in 1 comparison.

subject: Programming, DS & Algorithms
question: Average comparisons in linear search for n elements:
explanation: On average, target is in the middle: n/2 comparisons.
